title: Best Practices for Database Relationships Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on ensuring consistent and performant database relationships.

questions.question: Which of these is a critical best practice for foreign keys?
options: Never use foreign keys in NoSQL
Randomize the values of all foreign keys
Use multiple primary keys for each foreign key

questions.question: Regarding SQL databases, which approach is best to follow by default?
options: Storing all data in a single large table

questions.question: Which rule for a foreign key constraint automatically deletes all related child records?
When should you use transactions for relationship-based operations?
options: Whenever performing atomic operations across multiple related tables

questions.question: What's an important consideration when using 'CASCADE' delete in a deep relationship chain?
options: Inadvertent mass deletions throughout the system
It allows primary keys to be duplicated
It prevents primary keys from ever being changed
